question: List all properties with their city, state, and estimated value
sql:
SELECT id, title, city, state, estimated_value
FROM properties;

question: Find all properties located in a specific city
Get average estimated property value by city
Find auctions that are currently running
sql:
SELECT *
FROM auctions
WHERE start_time <= NOW()
  AND end_time >= NOW();

question: Get auction details along with property information
sql:
SELECT 
  a.id AS auction_id,
  a.title AS auction_title,
  p.title AS property_title,
  p.city,
  p.state,
  a.starting_bid,
  a.current_bid,
  a.status
FROM auctions a
JOIN properties p ON a.property_id = p.id;

question: List all bids for a specific auction
Find the highest bid amount for each auction
Get the latest bid placed on each auction
Count total bids placed by each investor
Find investors who placed bids above a certain amount
Get total bidding volume per city
sql:
SELECT 
  p.city,
  SUM(b.bid_amount) AS total_bid_amount
FROM bids b
JOIN properties p ON b.property_id = p.id
GROUP BY p.city;

question: Find bids placed in the last 7 days
Count auctions created per month
sql:
SELECT 
  DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') AS month,
  COUNT(*) AS auction_count
FROM auctions
GROUP BY month;
